sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_timestamps (id INTEGER, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO test_timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 12:00:00+00');
UPDATE test_timestamps SET event_time = TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-01-01 13:30:00+00' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, datepart('hour', event_time) AS event_hour FROM test_timestamps;
SELECT id, datepart('minute', event_time) AS event_minute FROM test_timestamps WHERE datepart('hour', event_time) > 12;
